en: but you get enough done in the first week
ko: 이런 식으로, 처음에는 좀 천천히 시작하더라도 첫 주에 충분히 해놓으면 나중에 좀 더 집중해서

en: that you can get a lot done in the second week.
And you can get a lot done in the third week.
And you can get a lot done in the fourth week.
And you can get a lot done in the fifth week.
And you can get a lot done in the sixth week.
And you can get a lot done slowly,
but you get enough done in the first week
ko: 이런 식으로, 처음에는 좀 천천히 시작하더라도 첫 주에 충분히 해놓으면 나중에 좀 더 집중해서

en: that with some heavier days later on,
everything gets done and things stay civil.
ko: 나중에 다 끝내고 순탄하게 마무리되는 거지. 나도 그렇게 하고 싶었어, 그게 계획이었는데

en: And I would want to do that like that. That would be the plan.
ko: 나중에 다 끝내고 순탄하게 마무리되는 거지. 나도 그렇게 하고 싶었어, 그게 계획이었는데

en: I would have it all ready to go,
but then actually the paper would come along,
and then I would kind of do this.
ko: 다 준비해놓으려고 했는데 막상 리포트가 나오면 결국 이렇게 되는 거야, 그리고 매번

en: And that would happen every single paper.
But then came my 90-page senior thesis,
a paper you're supposed to spend a year on.
ko: 리포트마다 그랬어. 그러다가 90페이지짜리 졸업 논문이 나온 거야. 1년 동안 쓰는 건데, 나도 알았어 이런 리포트는

en: And I knew for a paper like that,
my normal workflow was not an option. It was way too big a project. So I planned things out,
and I decided I kind of had to go something like this. This is how the year would go.
So I'd start off light,
ko: 1년을 이렇게 보내는 거야. 처음엔 가볍게 시작하고 중간에 양을 늘리는 거지
